---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    self-contained: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body, .quarto-container, #quarto-content, .page-columns {
    background-color: #2C4A2E !important;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* Override Quarto's grid that causes side gaps */
  .page-columns {
    grid-template-columns: 0 0 1fr 0 !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
  }

  h1.title {
    color: #f5f0e8 !important;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  /* Cream text for page content only */
  p, li, span, .running-content {
    color: #f5f0e8;
  }

  /* Force navbar back to its original dark colors */
  #quarto-header,
  #quarto-header *,
  .navbar,
  .navbar *,
  .navbar-brand,
  .navbar-brand *,
  .nav-link,
  .navbar-nav .nav-link {
    color: #343a40 !important;
  }

  .hero-video-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100vw;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    height: 60vh;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 60px;
  }

  .hero-video-container video {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
  }

  .running-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 20px 80px;
  }

  .running-content h2, .running-content h3 {
    color: #f5f0e8;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  }

  .strava-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    background-color: #D4511E;
    color: white !important;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: 0;
    border: 2px solid #1C1915
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-family: 'Barlow Condensed', sans-serif;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    box-shadow: 3px 3px 0 #1C1915;
    margin-bottom: 48px;
  }
</style>

<!-- Hero Video -->
<div class="hero-video-container">
  <video autoplay muted loop playsinline>
    <source src="files/running.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  </video>
</div>

<!-- Rest of content -->
<div class="running-content">

  <a href="https://www.strava.com/athletes/53854051" target="_blank" class="strava-btn">
    My Strava
  </a>

  <h2>Partnerships</h2>

  <h3>Oakland Half x Under Armour Elite Team</h3>
  <blockquote class="instagram-media"
    data-instgrm-permalink="https://www.instagram.com/p/DWO0y71kTFG/"
    data-instgrm-version="14"
    style="width:100%; max-width:540px;">
  </blockquote>
  <script async src="//www.instagram.com/embed.js"></script>

  <h3>GU: Pace the Rainbow</h3>
  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center;">
    <iframe
      width="315"
      height="560"
      src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/vY5WS2eHcCo"
      title="Running YouTube Short"
      frameborder="0"
      allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
      allowfullscreen>
    </iframe>
  </div>

</div>
```
